sentiment.summary: VIX at 30, oil at $102, consumer confidence Expectations Index below 80 — tariffs, energy shock, and Fed paralysis keep markets under heavy pressure.

insights.text: Fear Mode: Tariffs + Oil Shock + Consumer Collapse. VIX at 30, oil at $102, consumer confidence Expectations Index below 80 — a recession signal. Fed locked at 3.5–3.75%. Less than 20% of S&P 500 stocks trade above their 50-day MA. Only energy is winning.

BTC at $67,114 — down 8% from your $73,135 cost basis. Macro headwinds from tariffs and geopolitical tension weigh on risk assets. No near-term catalyst back above $70K. Hold but watch macro for any shift.

Rocket Lab firing on all cylinders despite market gloom. Two launches this month (missions 84 & 85), Mynaric acquisition closing April, $190M hypersonic contract. Backlog above $2B. Trading at $60.93, just under your $62.04 cost. Long-term conviction hold.

EchoStar at ~$112, slightly below your $114.33 cost. Boost Mobile launching iPhone 17e adds retail positive. No major negative catalysts. Telecom sector neutral in current macro. Watch for any M&A developments.

T1 Energy cratering — down 18–20% today to $4.60, far below your $6.73 cost. Earnings miss triggered the dump. Acquisitions and partnerships offer recovery potential but risk is extreme. Reassess position sizing immediately.

Seagate at ~$370, deeply below your $448.98 cost basis. Analyst consensus PT at $447 implies eventual recovery. AI storage demand is a real tailwind but macro pressure on tech hardware persists. Painful hold — wait for rate relief catalyst.

Telesat ~$35.50, above your $33.33 cost — one of few green positions. Lightspeed LEO first satellite launch on track for December 2026. Landing stations completed in Quebec and Saskatchewan. Execution risk remains but trajectory is positive.

BigBear.ai bouncing +8.5% to $3.31 but still 63% below your $9.02 cost. Revenue missed hard at $27.3M vs $33.3M estimate. Debt cut 90%+, 17% growth guided for 2026. H.C. Wainwright cut PT to $6. Speculative recovery — do not add yet.

Nebius at $92, down 30% from your $131.12 cost basis. AI infrastructure play under compression as rates stay high. No major negative news but growth multiples are squeezed. Monitor for re-acceleration catalyst or rate cut signal.

Oklo at ~$45, down 64% from your $125 cost. NRC license for Atomic Alchemy isotopes is real progress. Meta 1.2GW Ohio campus partnership is massive long-term. $105M net loss and years from revenue — patience and conviction required.

Navitas at $7.72, down 23% from your $10 cost basis. Off 5% today amid sector headwinds. New CFO signals internal transition. GaN/SiC power semis have long-term upside but near-term competitive and macro pressure hurts. Hold cautiously.
